text:
Generate 6 character design proposals in a vector, animated art style of a young girl with short black hair holding a green umbrella. She is wearing a raincoat dress designed to resemble a green beetle, with the hood partially on her head and shaped like a beetle’s head.

The girl has a cheerful pose with a playful smile and is jumping on one foot over a bright blue water puddle. She is wearing green rain boots that match the raincoat.
I'll generate 6 character design proposals with the vector, animated art style you described. Let me create these in parallel:

text: Perfect! I've generated all 6 character design proposals featuring your cheerful beetle-raincoat girl in a vector, animated art style. Each design shows her with short black hair, green umbrella, beetle-inspired raincoat with hood, and jumping playfully over a blue puddle in her matching green rain boots.

[@image:#1:Mark Generation] The scene begins with a medium shot at a slight low angle as the girl joyfully jumps into a bright blue puddle. When her foot lands, water splashes upward in slow motion, with detailed droplets catching the light. The lighting is soft and slightly overcast, creating reflective highlights on the wet ground.

As she continues jumping from puddle to puddle, alternate her feet and vary her hand movements naturally. With each jump, she makes different playful and joyful facial expressions — laughing, smiling widely, closing her eyes in delight. Add subtle squash-and-stretch animation to enhance the sense of movement and energy. The camera slightly tracks her movement sideways, maintaining a lively and immersive feel.

For the final moment, the pacing shifts. The camera slowly pushes in as she accidentally lets go of her umbrella. The umbrella falls in slow motion and lands upside down on the wet ground. It spins on its own axis for one second, reflecting light dramatically from the puddle surface. The ambient sound and motion subtly soften.

Cut to a close-up of her face as her expression transitions from joy to sadness. Her smile fades, her eyes soften, and she looks down at the umbrella on the ground. The umbrella gently wobbles and then falls to one side. The scene ends with a quiet, emotional pause and a shallow depth of field focusing on her expression.

Style: high-quality 3D animation, soft cinematic lighting, realistic water physics, expressive character animation, emotional storytelling.
I'll create this emotional and dynamic animation sequence using the character from your image. This will be a beautifully crafted story with detailed water physics and expressive character animation.

text: Your emotional animation story has been completed!
